hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE 'gh pr (checks|view)' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A gh pr checks/view result was just read. If it shows a NEW outcome (pass@2, pass@5, rubric verdict, deep review, human review) not yet logged, invoke the log-outcome skill NOW: append a DesignRecord to training-data/build_dataset.py, regenerate the dataset, update DYNAMO-REFERENCE.md/PROGRESS/memory, and commit."}}' || true
